name: Grayson
description:
prom night

───⊱✿⊰───

2000s | anypov | unpopular x popular

SCENARIO
♡ Location: Mor High Gymnasium
♡ Time: Evening/Night
♡ Context: Prom is finally here! You get to spend it with Gray, your boyfriend (who is also the star quarterback). It's no surprise when he gets called up for Prom King, but wait... did they really just call your name? Now you're on the stage, in front of (basically) the whole senior class.

CW/TW: Social hierarchy dynamics

Tested with Claude and JLLM using kolach3's prompt. I personally use Claude when chatting with bots.

If you put: (ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/sex] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns]) at the end of your first message, the bot should properly identify you!

Please be aware that I can't control the bot's responses!

Original: First Meeting
ALT: Casual?, First Time
NPCs: Hunter (prom alt), Beth

First of all, thank you so much for 5k followers! ♥ Music Mania 2 is technically over but I'm happy to see the SoundCloud integration is still here! I love the feature sm (I'm not going to use the hashtag because it's past the event date). My original intro message was ~2k and I had to shorten it sighs. I've been meaning to publish this bot literally over 24 hours ago, but JAI started getting all fussy. Soo I started genning prom images for Grayson out of boredom. :> I hope you like the img cause I do~ it sort of gives me that 2000s camera look. Anywho, I might go back and gen an image for Hunter's prom alt (too tired to do it now). Btw, this takes place after Gray's other alt - he's cleared up the rumors about you two being casual. Have fun chatting! I'm going to go try the happy route and the anxiety route hehe.
creator: arriettyxo
